tasks.instruction: Dopasuj nazwy zwierząt (1–6) do ciekawych faktów na ich temat (A–H). Dwa opisy zostały podane dodatkowo i nie pasują do żadnego elementu.

options.text: This large black and white mammal from China eats almost nothing but bamboo. It is one of the world's most endangered animals.
This African mammal is the tallest animal in the world. Its extremely long neck helps it reach leaves high up in trees.
This sea mammal uses a system called echolocation to navigate and hunt in dark water. It is highly intelligent and lives in groups called pods.
This bird cannot fly but is an excellent swimmer. It lives mainly in Antarctica and uses its wings as flippers to move through water.
This nocturnal animal from Australia carries its young in a pouch. It moves by hopping on its powerful back legs.
This reptile can change the colour of its skin to communicate and camouflage itself. Its eyes move independently of each other.
This large spider builds strong webs and is found on every continent except Antarctica. Some species can catch and eat small birds.
This insect travels thousands of kilometres during its annual migration between North America and Mexico, guided by the position of the Sun.
